case_title: CALIFORNIA SAVINGS & LOAN, A FEDERAL ASSOCIATION vs. SALVADOR, YOLANDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SAVINGS & LOAN, A FEDERAL ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT SALVADOR, YOLANDA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SALVADOR, YOLANDA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SAVINGS & LOAN, A FEDERAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALVADOR, YOLANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1079 FLORIDA ST $5,736.78 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,536.78, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EXECUTION TO 31-DEC-93. IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY THEN, PLTF TO WAIVE ALL DAMAGES, DEFT TO WAIVE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
